tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.parent_entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent entities are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Approval of 2024 Committee Work Plan - Jan 2024

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2024 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

The Agency will present its revised 2024 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2024 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2024 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2024 Adopted Budget.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2023 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.

tool_args.label: May Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs - April 2024

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints. In alternating quarters, the report will include additional information on diversity initiatives.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2023 Operating Results - May 2024

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
The agency will provide Mid-Year update on Railroad Operations.

tool_args.label: September Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs - July 2024

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2025 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2024 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The agency will provide comprehensive report on the Safety/Security.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2025 Budget.

tool_args.label: November Timetable Change & Fall Trackwork Programs - October 2024

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2025.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.subject: Key Performance Metrics Reports

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Chief's Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Safety Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.subject: Procurements

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: MTA Police Report

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road Committee part of LIRR

payload.description: The Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan covers LIRR committee business.

tool_args.label: MTA Police reports to LIRR Committee

payload.description: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported, as a recurring agenda item for the Long Island Rail Road Committee.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road Committee part of MTA

payload.description: The Long Island Rail Road Committee is an MTA Board committee.
